# AI Alpha Squad

> Experimental multi-agent software delivery lab — business requests in, working software out. A playground, not a product.

AI Alpha Squad is an experimental delivery lab that orchestrates specialized AI agents from business analysis through architecture, implementation, validation, and release. It runs on GitHub Actions with Hugging Face Inference Providers powering the models behind every agent (GitHub Copilot is a legacy optional runtime). The Director (human) retains final authority; GitHub Issues are the source of truth.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://aialphasquad.com/
- About: https://aialphasquad.com/about/
- Contact: https://aialphasquad.com/contact/
- Sitemap: https://aialphasquad.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://aialphasquad.com/robots.txt
- Repository: https://github.com/eduardocerqueira/ai-alpha-squad
- Work queue: https://github.com/users/eduardocerqueira/projects/6/views/1

## Contact

- Email: contact@aialphasquad.com
- Contact form: https://aialphasquad.com/contact/

## How to reach the squad

1. **GitHub Issues** — Primary work queue. Open an issue on the ai-alpha-squad repository to submit a business request.
2. **REST API** — GitHub REST API for issues, labels, and project automation. Integrate programmatically with the work queue.
3. **WhatsApp** — Director channel for approvals and release decisions. Business Owner and Release Manager agents message the Director; replies are mirrored to GitHub Issues.

## Agent pipeline

Director → GitHub Issues → Business Owner → Architect → Developer → QA / Security / DevOps / Tech Writer → Release Manager → Target repository (PR, CI/CD, release).

## Keywords

autonomous agents, multi-agent software delivery, AI engineering lab, experimental AI agents, GitHub Issues workflow, agent orchestration, GitHub Actions, Hugging Face inference providers, open models
